executives.name: John Londry
executives.background: Mr. Londry is a professional geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles with major mining companies.

executives.name: Rein Lehari
executives.background: Mr. Lehari is a Chartered Professional Accountant and was formerly a partner with PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Thomas Parker
executives.background: Mr. Parker has over 50 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive roles at High Plains Uranium and Anderson & Schwab.
